findings.evidence: `rg -n "normalizedChebyshevTLp|inner_normalizedChebyshevTLp_real|orthonormal_normalizedChebyshevTLp_real"` shows the family is generic at lines 216-223 but the exported inner/orthonormal lemmas are real-only at lines 255 and 273; the roadmap target at `TauCetiRoadmap/OrthogonalL2Bases/README.md:331` is `chebyshevHilbertBasis 𝕜 : HilbertBasis ℕ 𝕜 (Lp 𝕜 2 measureT)`.
findings.fix: State the consumer lemmas at the natural scalar level, e.g. `inner_normalizedChebyshevTLp {𝕜 : Type*} [RCLike 𝕜] (m n : ℕ) : inner 𝕜 (normalizedChebyshevTLp 𝕜 m) (normalizedChebyshevTLp 𝕜 n) = if m = n then 1 else 0` and `orthonormal_normalizedChebyshevTLp : Orthonormal 𝕜 (normalizedChebyshevTLp 𝕜)`, deriving the real versions only as special cases if needed.
findings.issue: `inner_normalizedChebyshevTLp_real` and `orthonormal_normalizedChebyshevTLp_real` are special-cased to `ℝ` while `normalizedChebyshevTLp` is already defined for every `[RCLike 𝕜]`.

summary: The new `Lp` family is correctly parameterized over `RCLike 𝕜`, but the orthonormality API stops at the real specialization even though the roadmap target is `HilbertBasis ℕ 𝕜 (Lp 𝕜 2 measureT)`.
